title: BEM-840 curator Claude restore
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/curator/tasks','governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude','governance/workflow_dispatch_queue','governance/autonomy','governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-22 | 05:59 (UTC+3)'
curator=Path('governance/curator/tasks/bem840_internal_auditor_protocol_alignment.json')
curator.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'curator_task.v1','bem':'BEM-840','status':'assigned_to_curator','objective':'Curator must route protocol alignment task to Claude Internal Auditor through mailbox, then GPT monitors mailbox every minute until real response appears.','target':'claude_internal_auditor','mailbox_request':'governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude/bem840_protocol_alignment_request.md','created_at':created,'operator_role':'none'},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
mail=Path('governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude/bem840_protocol_alignment_request.md')
mail.write_text('# BEM-840 | PROTOCOL ALIGNMENT REQUEST TO CLAUDE INTERNAL AUDITOR'+sep+sep+'Date: '+created+sep+sep+'From: GPT External Auditor / Curator route'+sep+'To: Claude Internal Auditor'+sep+sep+'Task: review the proposed multi-agent development protocol and return a real mailbox response.'+sep+sep+'Required output path: governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/bem840_claude_protocol_alignment_response.md'+sep+sep+'Required sections:'+sep+'1. Decision: APPROVED / CHANGE_REQUIRED / BLOCKED'+sep+'2. What architecture you approve or reject'+sep+'3. Required changes for curator -> internal auditor -> mailbox -> GPT minute watchdog flow'+sep+'4. Protocol table amendments'+sep+'5. Reason why previous mailbox responses were missing, if detectable from repo state'+sep+sep+'No issue comments. Do not expose secrets.'+sep)
watch=Path('governance/autonomy/claude_mailbox_watchdog_active.json')
watch.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'claude_mailbox_watchdog_active.v2','active':True,'interval_minutes':1,'mode':'monitor_until_real_claude_response','source_bem':'BEM-840','mailbox':'governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt','request':'governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude/bem840_protocol_alignment_request.md','started_at':created,'operator_role':'none','stop_condition':'real Claude response with Decision and without NOT CLAUDE APPROVAL/runtime blocker'},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
queue=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem840_claude_internal_auditor_dispatch.json')
queue.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v9','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-840 curator-routed protocol alignment request to Claude internal auditor','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
state={'bem':'BEM-840','status':'curator_to_claude_mailbox_flow_restored','curator_task':str(curator),'mailbox_request':str(mail),'watchdog_active':str(watch),'dispatch_queue':str(queue),'next_action':'fresh Codex tick, then verify dispatch result, runtime, and real Claude response every minute','created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem840_curator_to_claude_mailbox_restore.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem840_curator_to_claude_mailbox_restore.md').write_text('# BEM-840 | Curator To Claude Mailbox Restore | ACTIVE'+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem840_next.md').write_text('Next: tick dispatch queue and monitor Claude mailbox every minute until real response. Operator relay forbidden.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-840'+sep+sep+'Curator task, Claude mailbox request, active minute watchdog, and dispatch queue item created. Continue until real response.'+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend([str(curator),str(mail),str(watch),str(queue),'governance/state/bem840_curator_to_claude_mailbox_restore.json','governance/reports/bem840_curator_to_claude_mailbox_restore.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem840_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
